description_long: This house features a prominent terracotta gable roof with multiple ridges and dormers, giving it a traditional yet substantial appearance. The front facade is defined by a covered entryway with columns, a wide staircase, and a driveway leading to a garage beneath the main living area. The property is enclosed by a combination of white and black boundary walls, with landscaped green areas and paved walkways. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool and a patio area, ideal for outdoor activities. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large panes and others smaller, providing varied natural light. The overall design blends Mediterranean and Craftsman influences, with a focus on outdoor living and architectural detail.
description: A large house with a terracotta gable roof, covered entryway, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool, surrounded by white and black boundary walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, wide staircase, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garage entrance, and the transition to the backyard with the pool visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the boundary wall, side yard, and the pool area extending from the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with columns, wide staircase, and a prominent overhang
